purpose: Audit reusable course-description content sources and implementation surfaces for 910CPR course pages and schedule selectors.

source_findings.slug_hubs: Strongest existing source for public page copy, especially Heartsaver, ARC, HSI, BLS, ACLS, and PALS hub/course-panel descriptions.
source_findings.course_master: Contains short descriptions for schedule-facing records. Only some records have rich description_long content; several long descriptions are unknown or contain partner-specific copy that should not be blindly promoted.
source_findings.course_catalog: Useful canonical operational metadata, but not complete enough to be the final public description source.
source_findings.generated_class_pages: May contain Enrollware-derived class/session detail pages, but those are not the right reusable source for broad course descriptions.
source_findings.schedule_selector_pages: Previously had short option clarification text only; now use compact expandable course details from data/content/course_descriptions.json.
source_findings.date_time_cards: Intentionally unchanged. Long descriptions are not added to individual date/time/register cards.

implemented_selector_surface.behavior: Course cards include optional collapsed Course details panels using structured content fields. Register cards and appointment URLs are unchanged.

courses_with_structured_content.title: AHA Heartsaver CPR AED Online + Skills
AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Online + Skills
AHA Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid / CPR / AED
AHA Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid CPR AED Online + Skills
American Red Cross Basic Life Support
American Red Cross Basic Life Support - Blended Learning

copyright_handling.approach: Concise 910CPR-controlled summaries and structured fields were added instead of copying long third-party/manual prose verbatim.

validation_notes.heartsaver_asap_broadening_control: Removed in pending local selector work; generated Heartsaver schedule output does not contain the public ASAP broadening label.

recommended_next_steps: Promote course_descriptions.json into slug hub/course-page generation after review of page-specific copy precedence.
Backfill richer ARC and HSI course-specific details once accepted public descriptions are approved.
Avoid using partner-specific course_master.description_long values until each is reviewed for public context.
